---
title: "Pinus — Tree genera"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in the genus *Pinus* (Pines)

[Back to Tree Database](../index.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Black Pine](/trees/species/black-pine.html) | 0 | — |

- [*Pinus nigra* Black Pine](/trees/species/black-pine.html) — 0 trees
